entrypoints.run: Codex App Computer Use -> existing browser session -> https://chatgpt.com

inputs: no secrets, credentials, customer PII, private tokens, or unredacted proprietary data

safety.credential_policy: no harness-managed username, password, token, cookie, API key, or login automation
boundaries: use only an already-authenticated operator-owned browser session
do not bypass login, captcha, rate limits, or account controls
do not store browser cookies or credentials in the repository
redact private code, secrets, customer data, and proprietary identifiers before sending
treat the response as advisory review evidence, never deterministic proof
verify adopted claims with source checks, tests, or project evidence
forbidden_claims: latest knowledge verified without source evidence
safe to merge based only on ChatGPT output
authentication not needed because the harness can log in

checks: needs_verification is present for claims that require proof
